medals.name: Tornado Survivor
medals.description: You rode the cyclone all the way to Oz.

medals.name: Ruby Slippers
medals.description: Glinda's gift now glitters on your feet.

medals.name: Brain for the Scarecrow
medals.description: You lifted the Scarecrow down from his pole.

medals.name: Heart for the Tin Man
medals.description: You oiled the Tin Man's rusted joints.

medals.name: Courage for the Lion
medals.description: You stood up to the great roaring beast — and made a friend.

medals.name: Yellow Brick Wanderer
medals.description: You followed the road through fields and forests.

medals.name: Field of Flowers
medals.description: You crossed the sleeping poppies and lived to remember it.

medals.name: Emerald City
medals.description: You stood inside the shining green walls.

medals.name: Witch's Bane
medals.description: The Wicked Witch is no more.

medals.name: Balloon Pilot
medals.description: You watched the great green balloon rise into the sky.

medals.name: Home Sweet Home
medals.description: Three clicks of the heels — and Kansas again.

medals.name: Creative Hero
medals.description: You told the story your own way, again and again.

medals.name: Wolf Slayer
medals.description: You faced down the wolves of the forest.

medals.name: Kind Soul
medals.description: You showed kindness to a frightened wolf pup.

medals.name: Friend of Mice
medals.description: The Field Mouse King counts you among his allies.
